members.name: Jason Smith
members.notes: Elected to Congress via 2013 special election (113th). Appointed to W&M for 114th Congress (2015). Became chair in 118th Congress (2023).

members.name: Vern Buchanan
members.notes: Named to Ways and Means for the 112th Congress (2011). First elected to Congress in 2006.

members.name: Adrian Smith
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means around 2010-2011. Was a member during the 112th Congress. First elected 2006.

members.name: Mike Kelly
members.notes: Selected to serve on Ways and Means for the 113th Congress (announced Nov 30, 2012). First elected 2010.

members.name: David Schweikert
members.notes: Previously served on Financial Services. Joined Ways and Means for the 114th Congress (2015). First elected 2010.

members.name: Darin LaHood
members.notes: Announced selection to Ways and Means in January 2018 for the 115th Congress (mid-Congress appointment). Elected via 2015 special election.

members.name: Jodey Arrington
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means in his second term (116th Congress, 2019). First elected 2016.

members.name: Ron Estes
members.notes: Elected by House Republican Steering Committee to Ways and Means for the 116th Congress (Jan 2019). Won special election Apr 2017.

members.name: Lloyd Smucker
members.notes: Served on Ways and Means during 115th and 116th Congresses. First elected 2016.

members.name: Kevin Hern
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means in January 2021 (117th Congress). First Oklahoman in two decades on the committee. Won special election 2018.

members.name: Carol Miller
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for the 117th Congress (Feb 2021). First woman from WV on the committee. First elected 2018.

members.name: Greg Murphy
members.notes: Selected to join Ways and Means in January 2022 (mid-117th Congress filling an open seat). Won special election Sept 2019.

members.name: David Kustoff
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means for 119th Congress (announced Jan 2, 2025). Previously served on Financial Services. First elected 2016.

members.name: Brian Fitzpatrick
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for the 118th Congress (Jan 2023). First elected 2016.

members.name: Greg Steube
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for the 118th Congress (Jan 2023). First elected 2018.

members.name: Claudia Tenney
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 118th Congress (Jan 11, 2023). Initially elected 2016, lost 2018, re-elected 2020.

members.name: Michelle Fischbach
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means for the 118th Congress (2023). First elected to House 2020.

members.name: Blake Moore
members.notes: Elected to Ways and Means by House Steering Committee in Jan 2023 (118th Congress). First Republican from Utah on the committee. First elected 2020.

members.name: Beth Van Duyne
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 118th Congress (Jan 11, 2023). First elected 2020.

members.name: Randy Feenstra
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 118th Congress (Jan 2023). First elected 2020.

members.name: Nicole Malliotakis
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 118th Congress (Jan 2023). First elected 2020.

members.name: Mike Carey
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 118th Congress (Jan 11, 2023). Won special election Nov 2021.

members.name: Rudy Yakym
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 119th Congress (2025). Won special election Nov 2022.

members.name: Max Miller
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 119th Congress (Dec 2024 announcement). First elected 2022.

members.name: Aaron Bean
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means for 119th Congress (Dec 16, 2024 announcement). First elected 2022.

members.name: Nathaniel Moran
members.notes: New member of Ways and Means for 119th Congress (Jan 2025). Previously served on Education and Foreign Affairs in 118th. First elected 2022.

members.name: Richard Neal
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means in 1993 (103rd Congress). Served as Chair in 116th-117th Congress (2019-2023). In Congress since 1989.

members.name: Lloyd Doggett
members.notes: In Congress since 1995. Joined Ways and Means approximately 106th Congress (1999). Named Health Subcommittee Chairman in 117th Congress.

members.name: Mike Thompson
members.notes: First elected 1998. Joined Ways and Means approximately 110th Congress (2007). Reappointed in 114th Congress and subsequent sessions.

members.name: John Larson
members.notes: Named to Ways and Means by Democratic Caucus, press release dated Jan 5, 2005 (109th Congress). First elected 1998.

members.name: Danny Davis
members.notes: In Congress since 1997. Joined Ways and Means approximately 110th Congress (2007). Repeatedly reappointed through 119th Congress.

members.name: Linda Sanchez
members.notes: First Latina on Ways and Means. Served on the committee in the 111th Congress (2009). Initially on Judiciary Committee when first elected 2002.

members.name: Terri Sewell
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means for the 115th Congress (2017). First elected 2010.

members.name: Suzan DelBene
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means for the 115th Congress (announced Jan 5, 2017). First sworn in Nov 2012 via special election.

members.name: Judy Chu
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means in 115th Congress (2017), filling Xavier Becerra's seat after he resigned to become CA Attorney General. First elected 2009.

members.name: Gwen Moore
members.notes: Nominated for Ways and Means by Democratic Steering and Policy Committee for 116th Congress (2019). Previously on Financial Services. First elected 2004.

members.name: Brendan Boyle
members.notes: Selected for Ways and Means by Democratic Steering Committee (Jan 10, 2019, 116th Congress). First elected 2014.

members.name: Don Beyer
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 116th Congress (Jan 10, 2019). First elected 2014.

members.name: Dwight Evans
members.notes: Named to Ways and Means for 116th Congress (Jan 9, 2019). First African American from PA on the committee. Won special election Nov 2016.

members.name: Brad Schneider
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 116th Congress (2019). First elected 2012, lost 2014, re-elected 2016.

members.name: Jimmy Panetta
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 116th Congress (Jan 10, 2019). First elected 2016.

members.name: Jimmy Gomez
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means for 116th Congress (2019). Won special election June 2017.

members.name: Steven Horsford
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means shortly after being sworn in Jan 2019 (116th Congress). Previously served 113th Congress (2013-15) then returned 2019.

members.name: Stacey Plaskett
members.notes: Appointed to Ways and Means for 117th Congress (2021). First member from a U.S. territory on the committee. First elected 2014.

members.name: Thomas Suozzi
members.notes: Joined Ways and Means in 116th Congress (2019). Left Congress 2022 to run for governor, returned via Feb 2024 special election. Reappointed for 119th Congress.

members.name: Mike Crapo
members.notes: Joined Senate Finance Committee in 2005 (109th Congress). Previously Ranking Member. Became Chair in 119th Congress (2025). In Senate since 1999.

members.name: Chuck Grassley
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee in 2001 (107th Congress). Served as Chairman or Ranking Member 2001-2010 and again 2019-2021. In Senate since 1981.

members.name: John Cornyn
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee approximately 113th Congress (2013). Chaired Trade subcommittee in 114th Congress. In Senate since 2002.

members.name: John Thune
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for the 112th Congress (2011). Currently Senate Majority Leader. In Senate since 2005.

members.name: Tim Scott
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee in 2015 (114th Congress) when Republicans took Senate majority. Appointed to Senate Dec 2012, elected 2014.

members.name: Bill Cassidy
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for the 114th Congress (2015), his first term in the Senate. Chaired Finance subcommittee in 116th Congress. Elected to Senate 2014.

members.name: James Lankford
members.notes: Selected for Finance Committee for 116th Congress (announced Jan 3, 2019 by McConnell). In Senate since 2015.

members.name: Steve Daines
members.notes: Appointed to Finance Committee for 117th Congress (Feb 2021). Third Montana senator ever on Finance. In Senate since 2015.

members.name: Todd Young
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee in his first term (115th Congress, 2017). In Senate since 2017.

members.name: John Barrasso
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 117th Congress (Feb 2021). Previously focused on Energy and Natural Resources. In Senate since 2007.

members.name: Ron Johnson
members.notes: Welcomed to Finance Committee for 118th Congress (Feb 2023) by Ranking Member Crapo. Previously chaired Homeland Security. In Senate since 2011.

members.name: Thom Tillis
members.notes: Appointed to Finance Committee for 118th Congress (Feb 2023). In Senate since 2015.

members.name: Marsha Blackburn
members.notes: Named to Finance Committee for 118th Congress (Feb 2023). In Senate since 2019.

members.name: Roger Marshall
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 7, 2025 announcement). In Senate since 2021.

members.name: Ron Wyden
members.notes: Long-serving Finance Committee member; became chairman in 2014 after Baucus departure. Ranking Member in 119th Congress. In Senate since 1996.

members.name: Maria Cantwell
members.notes: Active on Finance Committee by 2009 (participating in health care reform votes). In Senate since 2001.

members.name: Michael Bennet
members.notes: Listed as Finance Committee member during 113th Congress (2013-2014). Appointed to Senate Jan 2009.

members.name: Mark Warner
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee approximately 114th Congress (2015). Initially assigned to Banking, Budget, Commerce when entering Senate in 2009.

members.name: Sheldon Whitehouse
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee during the 2nd session of 115th Congress (2018). In Senate since 2007.

members.name: Maggie Hassan
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 116th Congress (announced Dec 13, 2018). In Senate since 2017.

members.name: Catherine Cortez Masto
members.notes: Appointed to Finance Committee for 116th Congress (announced Dec 13, 2018). In Senate since 2017.

members.name: Elizabeth Warren
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 117th Congress (Feb 2021). Introduced Wealth Tax upon joining. In Senate since 2013.

members.name: Bernie Sanders
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 6, 2025). One of five new Democratic additions. Previously chaired Budget and HELP committees. In Senate since 2007.

members.name: Tina Smith
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 2025). One of five new Democratic additions. In Senate since 2018.

members.name: Ben Ray Lujan
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 3, 2025 announcement). New appointment. In Senate since 2021.

members.name: Raphael Warnock
members.notes: Appointed to Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 2, 2025 announcement). One of five new Democratic additions. In Senate since 2021.

members.name: Peter Welch
members.notes: Joined Finance Committee for 119th Congress (Jan 2025). One of five new Democratic additions. Both VT senators now on Finance. In Senate since 2023.
